title: Set up BullMQ job queue with Redis
summary: Production-grade background job queue with BullMQ on Redis: workers, schedulers, retries, and monitoring via Bull Board.
declaration: I will set up BullMQ for background job processing. BullMQ uses Redis as its backend and provides reliable queues with retries, scheduling, and priority. I will need a Redis instance — local Docker or a managed Redis service. If you need serverless-compatible jobs instead, consider Inngest.
